title: Authors and Citation
text: SECK K (2026). mlr3learners.gpfit: Gaussian Process Learner mlr3. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/KhalifaSeck/mlr3learners.gpfit.
code: @Manual{,   title = {mlr3learners.gpfit: Gaussian Process Learner for mlr3},   author = {Khalifa SECK},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/KhalifaSeck/mlr3learners.gpfit}, }

title: Gaussian Process Learner for mlr3
text: Gaussian Process regression learner mlr3 using GPfit package.

title: Gaussian Process Learner for mlr3
code: library(mlr3) library(mlr3learners.gpfit)  # Create a regression task task = tsk("mtcars")  # Create the GP learner learner = lrn("regr.gpfit")  # Train the model learner$train(task)  # Make predictions prediction = learner$predict(task) print(prediction)  # Evaluate performance prediction$score(msr("regr.mse"))

title: Gaussian Process Learner for mlr3

what: mlr3learners.gpfit: Gaussian Process Learner for mlr3 — mlr3learners.gpfit-package
title: mlr3learners.gpfit: Gaussian Process Learner for mlr3 — mlr3learners.gpfit-package
text: Implements Gaussian Process regression using GPfit package mlr3 learner. Provides GP_fit() functionality within mlr3 framework machine learning tasks.

title: mlr3learners.gpfit: Gaussian Process Learner for mlr3 — mlr3learners.gpfit-package
Gaussian Process Regression Learner — mlr_learners_regr.gpfit
text: Gaussian Process regression using GPfit package. Calls GPfit::GP_fit() training predict method predictions.

title: Gaussian Process Regression Learner — mlr_learners_regr.gpfit
text: MacDonald, B., Ranjan, P., Chipman, H. (2015). "GPfit: R Package Fitting Gaussian Process Model Deterministic Simulator Outputs." Journal Statistical Software, 64(12), 1-23.

title: Gaussian Process Regression Learner — mlr_learners_regr.gpfit
text: mlr3::Learner$base_learner() mlr3::Learner$configure() mlr3::Learner$encapsulate() mlr3::Learner$format() mlr3::Learner$help() mlr3::Learner$predict() mlr3::Learner$predict_newdata() mlr3::Learner$print() mlr3::Learner$reset() mlr3::Learner$selected_features() mlr3::Learner$train() mlr3::LearnerRegr$predict_newdata_fast()

title: Gaussian Process Regression Learner — mlr_learners_regr.gpfit
code: library(mlr3)  # Create a regression task task = tsk("mtcars")  # Create the learner learner = lrn("regr.gpfit")  # Train the model learner$train(task) #> Warning: X should be in range (0, 1)  # Make predictions prediction = learner$predict(task) print(prediction) #>  #> ── <PredictionRegr> for 32 observations: ─────────────────────────────────────── #>  row_ids truth response #>        1  21.0     21.0 #>        2  21.0     21.0 #>        3  22.8     22.8 #>      ---   ---      --- #>       30  19.7     19.7 #>       31  15.0     15.0 #>       32  21.4     21.4
